email_subject: Application for Brand & Content Specialist at Konnekt
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Brand & Content Specialist position at Konnekt. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and content creation, I am excited about the opportunity to help build and amplify Konnekt's brand presence across channels.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build WordPress sites—skills directly applicable to creating compelling content and optimizing vacancies. My project mirook.com involved full-site design, structured data implementation, and social media integration, demonstrating my ability to manage branding from concept to execution.

I am hands-on, creative, and detail-oriented, with experience in analytics to measure and refine campaigns. I am eager to bring my content and marketing skills to Konnekt and contribute to your team's visibility and storytelling.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how I can support Konnekt's brand.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am thrilled to apply for the Brand & Content Specialist role at Konnekt. Your mission—to make a brand recognizable everywhere, from LinkedIn to events, through creative campaigns and compelling content—resonates deeply with my experience and passion for digital marketing and storytelling.

As a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I have honed skills directly relevant to this role: I write SEO-optimized blog content that engages readers, manage WordPress sites with a keen eye for design, and analyze performance data to refine strategies. I have also built mirook.com from scratch, handling everything from site architecture and structured data to social media integration—a project that mirrors the hands-on, multi-channel brand building you seek.

I am particularly drawn to the opportunity to create content that people want to read and share, and to optimize vacancies to attract top talent. My experience with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush) ensures I can measure impact and iterate effectively. I am creative, independent, and detail-oriented, with a knack for translating brand stories into visuals and copy that resonate.

Konnekt's focus on building a brand from the ground up excites me. I am eager to bring my content creation, SEO, and design skills to your team, and to grow alongside a company that values innovation and authenticity.

Thank you for considering my application. I would love to discuss how I can contribute to Konnekt's visibility and success.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Experienced in creating SEO-optimized content and managing WordPress sites, directly applicable to crafting compelling vacancies and brand materials.
• Built and managed a full brand website (mirook.com) including design, content, structured data, and social media integration—demonstrating end-to-end brand content skills.
• Proficient in analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush) to measure campaign performance and optimize strategies.
• Hands-on experience with social media content and integration, supporting multi-channel brand presence.
• Creative and detail-oriented with a technical foundation in web design and SEO, enabling effective collaboration on visual and digital content.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Brand
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, brand building, and SEO. At Episto, I write keyword-targeted blog content, manage WordPress sites, and optimize for organic visibility. On my own project (mirook.com), I handled full brand development—from site design and structured data to social media integration—improving search visibility across traditional and AI-powered platforms. Skilled in creating content that engages audiences and drives results, with a strong eye for design and detail. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
